rationale: The plan extends existing Settings, WebSocket backpressure, terminal scheduler, replay/repair, and telemetry surfaces already present in BGSTAB. Work is multi-phase but additive and rollbackable by Settings.
conditions: Default wsSendMode must not change before observe/enforce evidence is collected.
Recovery transaction ordering must not be reordered by control priority.
Raw terminal input/output must not be persisted in telemetry or soak artifacts.
